All Knowing.name: All Knowing
All Knowing.description: 100% increased Wisdom when the count is 3

Analytical.name: Analytical
Analytical.description: 10% increased batting Attributes when facing a left

Clutch.name: Clutch
Clutch.description: 25% increased Contact if a runner is on second or third base

Cowardly.name: Cowardly
Cowardly.description: 50% reduced Contact. Opposing Pitcher gains 50% increased Stuff

Creative.name: Creative
Creative.description: 10% increased pitching Attributes when facing a right

Criminal.name: Criminal
Criminal.description: Upon successfully stealing a base, next attempt has a 100% increased success chance

First Strike.name: First Strike
First Strike.description: 25% increased Velocity when the count is 0

Insider.name: Insider
Insider.description: 10% increased Batting Attributes if a pitch is Inside

Introverted.name: Introverted
Introverted.description: 10% increased Batting Attributes when no runners are on base

Intuitive.name: Intuitive
Intuitive.description: 10% increased batting Attributes when facing a right

Iron Will.name: Iron Will
Iron Will.description: 10% increased Pitching Attributes if a runner is in scoring position

Logical.name: Logical
Logical.description: 10% increased pitching Attributes when facing a left

Lucky.name: Lucky
Lucky.description: This player's Luck rolls are Lucky

Outsider.name: Outsider
Outsider.description: 10% increased Batting Attributes if a pitch is Outside

Partier.name: Partier
Partier.description: 300% increased Luck within 10 days of their Birthday

Strong Starter.name: Strong Starter
Strong Starter.description: 10% increased Pitching Attributes if no runners are on base

Underdog.name: Underdog
Underdog.description: 10% increased Batting Attributes if trailing by 3 or more Runs

Unrelenting.name: Unrelenting
Unrelenting.description: 100% increased Guts and Defiance. 50% reduced maximum Energy

Unwavering.name: Unwavering
Unwavering.description: 2% increased Pitching Attributes per Run the opposing Team has scored
